courses.title: Photography
courses.desc: From camera fundamentals to studio lighting, posing and delivery — shoot with confidence. Small cohorts inside a working Lagos studio, with real sets and real client work from week one.

courses.title: Cinematography & Video
courses.desc: Learn to shoot cinematic film — camera movement, lighting, directing and on-set sound. You leave with finished, graded work on your reel, shot on real productions.

courses.title: Photo Editing & Retouching
courses.desc: Master Lightroom and Photoshop — colour grading and clean, natural retouching. Hybrid format: in-studio sessions plus guided practice you complete from home.

courses.title: Video Editing & Post
courses.desc: Edit like a pro — Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve, grading, sound design and client delivery specs. Cut real footage from our productions, not stock clips.
